utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: Each item must include the specified coverage type and costs.
- health_coverage: Provides physical and mental health insurance with a description and a cost breakdown (€165/month with split). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: States home/contents insurance with a description and monthly cost (€60/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with relevant description and monthly cost (€50/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement service (gym reimbursement) and states cost (€0 included). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Gives monthly (€275) and annual (€3300) cost breakdown; includes a description. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and meet the “with costs” requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical and mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. These names exactly match items in the ground-truth ratings. For health, both physical and mental are LifeFirst Standard Plan, so we map each to the corresponding ratings under primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health). Property coverage maps to property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage. Travel coverage maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.InsurePlus Standard Plan. Additional services mention gym reimbursement included in LifeFirst health plan but that is not a separate rated item; total_budget is not a rated product.
